festival_logic: Volcanic Renewal marks the year midpoint.
Igniteday and Firedance bind forging and dance into cyclical observance.
Renewal observances tie house memory, rebuilding, and endurance to seasonal volcanic rhythm.
labor_bindings: Forging, extraction, and cooling periods follow volcanic rhythm.
Dormant periods open different trade windows.
ritual_bindings: Daily sacrifices and ancestral volcanic honor practices are time-bound.
House renewals, forge dedications, rebuilding vows, and survival oaths are bound to civic and household observance.
travel_bindings: Ash storms and cooling periods heavily affect safe travel windows.
legal_bindings: Martial and forge discipline are structured through cycle timing.
